Oracc: CAMS/GKAB — CAMS Geography of Knowledge Corpus

STT 2, 302 [unidentified hemerology][via cams/gkab]

o 1o 1

[... iti]BARA₂ U₄ 4-KAM₂ ana d[...] ⸢liš⸣-[ken ...]

[...] Nisannu (Month I), on the 4th day: may he prostrate himself before the god [...].

o 22

[*] U₄ 5-KAM₂ ana d[...] ⸢liš⸣-[ken ...]

On the 5th day: may he prostrate himself before [...].

o 33

* U₄ 13-KAM₂ ana dUTU liš-⸢ken⸣ [...]

On the 13th day: may he prostrate himself before Šamaš [...].

o 44

* U₄ 20-KAM₂ ana d30 liš-ken [...]

On the 20st day: may he prostrate himself before Sin [...].

o 55

* ina itiGU₄ U₄ [x]-KAM₂ ana d⸢EN?⸣.KI liš-ken [...]

In Ayyaru (Month II), on the [...] day: may he prostrate himself before Enki [...].

o 66

* U₄ 6-KAM₂ ana d20 liš-ken [...]

On the 6th day: may he prostrate himself before Šamaš [...].

o 77

* U₄ 16-KAM₂ ana de₂-a u dNU?.[DIM₂?.MUD? ...]

On the 16th day: may he prostrate himself before Ea and Nudimmud [...].

o 88

* U₄ 20-KAM₂ x [x] x dKA.⸢DI⸣ [...]

On the 20st day: ... [...] ... Ištaran [...].

o 99

* ina iti[SIG₄ ...]-KAM₂ ana [x] x x x [...]

In Simanu (Month III), [...] ... before [...] ... [...].

o 1010

* [...]-⸢KAM₂ ana d30⸣ x x AŠ₂ [...]

o 1111

* ⸢U₄⸣ 20-KAM₂ ana dUTU liš-⸢ken⸣ d[...]

o 1212

* ⸢U₄ 24?-KAM₂⸣ ana d!INANA liš-⸢ken⸣ [...]

r 9'9'

* U₄ 25-KAM₂ ina GU₂ ID₂ ana de₂-a liš-[ken ...]
